name: Momiji - Isekai'd and Find A Shrine Maiden
description:
On a pretty normal day in Tokyo you are struck and killed by a truck. However, you wake up in a new world, seemingly at the mercy of this curvy ninja girl...

Never played the Ninja Gaiden games, and couldn't think of a good plot. So, I settled for an Isekai plot, but I think it fits pretty well.

Bots lined up:

Owari Akane guaranteed next

Bambi and Candy soon

Tao Jun soon

Retsu Unohana soon

Arisa Gunhale pretty soon (also couldn't find a drip of info about her, so a personality summary would be useful if anyone has info about her. I literally couldn't find anything about Arisa Gunhale, other than she's involved with Gundams.

Art by Kunaboto

Also image below, Ibaraki Douji. Want some feedback on if I should do a bot of her. I know she's kunaboto, but the image is almost too wild in what it suggests, but I could try make a plot to make it light hearted and less... foul in what it looks like. With major image censoring cuz new rules.

(Unfortunately this is the only image kunaboto has of Ibaraki Douji)
